hard_rules.description: If required market data is missing, stale, or has invalid current price, the system must not open a new order. For the 15m strategy trigger, freshness is measured from the latest confirmed candle close with a default maximum age of 1080 seconds.
hard_rules.title: Missing or stale market data means hold

hard_rules.description: Broker execution is allowed only after the verifier and risk/order compiler approve a decision.
hard_rules.title: No execution before verifier pass

hard_rules.description: Any non-HOLD decision must cite valid rulebook IDs and an applicable playbook ID. Team-profile OPEN_LONG and OPEN_SHORT tickets must also prove profile compliance.
hard_rules.title: Non-HOLD LLM decisions must cite real rule IDs and fit team profiles

hard_rules.description: Invalid LLM output must not reach execution after bounded repair attempts fail.
hard_rules.title: Invalid LLM JSON or schema failure means hold

hard_rules.description: In autonomous paper or live-like modes, LLM, data, rule retrieval, verifier, compiler, or broker uncertainty must result in HOLD or halted execution.
hard_rules.title: Paper and live-like modes fail closed

hard_rules.description: A team risk percentage is a target capped by market structure and execution limits. A single position must not exceed the hard risk, margin, gross-notional, or leverage limits.
hard_rules.title: Maximum risk, margin, notional, and leverage policy

hard_rules.description: Any new non-HOLD trade must include both stop-loss and take-profit planning.
hard_rules.title: Stop loss and take profit required

hard_rules.description: New trades must satisfy the minimum reward-to-risk threshold before execution.
hard_rules.title: Minimum reward-to-risk requirement
